user_query: I'm planning a surprise vacation for my partner and I need some suggestions for romantic destinations. Can you fetch all the cases from the 360 Business Tool API to help me research the best travel options? Additionally, provide me with some romantic songs by Michael Jackson using the Chart Lyrics API to create a playlist for the trip.

TaskList.description: Fetch all travel cases from the 360 Business Tool API to identify romantic destinations.
Retrieve a list of romantic songs by Michael Jackson using the Chart Lyrics API.
